structural_claim: Physical systems exhibit hierarchical organization where high-energy/short-distance physics can be systematically integrated out to yield effective low-energy descriptions

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Physical theories flow under energy scale changes, with low-energy physics determined by relevant operators
High-energy degrees of freedom can be systematically integrated out, yielding effective low-energy theories
Fast electronic motion can be separated from slow nuclear motion due to mass hierarchy
Electronic transitions occur on timescales much faster than nuclear motion, creating an effective separation of scales
